title: ゴルディアスの結び目

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the tryouts. Today, race-ready Umamusume will display
their skills to prospective trainers in the hopes of being scouted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for me, I'm also on the lookout for a promising Umamusume to
scout and train.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You're kidding. I just took a look at the new pamphlet and I can't
believe my eyes—Agnes Tachyon is entering!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Huh, the Agnes Tachyon?! The one who's supposed to be as dangerous as she is talented?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A shiver runs down my spine as I recall the events of the other day.
However...

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Staff
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon, Agnes Tachyon?! That's weird... Cafe, have you seen
Tachyon?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: W-what? Why would I have seen her...

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Staff
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? What should I do...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so Tachyon's a no-show again. Aw, I wanted to see that
lightning-quick final spurt of hers that everyone always talks about.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Her grandmother won the Oaks, and her mother the Oka Sho. Before
she started at Tracen, everyone was saying she was the jewel of a
distinguished bloodline...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: But her eccentricity has put a bit of a damper on that...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Greetings, Manhattan Cafe. Agnes Tachyon is... not here, I take it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She should've received an official notice from the academy telling her
that participation in today's tryouts would be mandatory.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
About that... I'm the one who told her the teachers had something to
discuss with her the other day... I even saw her leave to meet with
them... But, well...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Another absence... I see. Thank you, I understand the situation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's expression looks strangely grim. Will Agnes Tachyon
be okay ditching today's tryouts?
choice_data_list: (Maybe I should go look for her.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave the tryouts behind and start searching for Agnes Tachyon's
whereabouts.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oy... Whatcha doing loafin' around here, Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A rare illogical query coming from you, my dear Shakur. I, a student of
this academy, am standing on campus. Is there any reason to inquire
about my intentions?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, that's not what I meant! Aren't you registered for today's
tryouts?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ha-ha-ha! No need to be so grouchy! Are your serotonin levels
getting low?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The answer is simple—I concluded that there was no reason to enter.
Unfortunately, my goals do not coincide with those of the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, the last time I entered, things didn't end pretty. All those
trainers swarmed me like guinea pigs to cabbage.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...That's just proof of how great you are at running.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The problem was, all of their training schedules had excessive wastes
of time. Throwing invaluable research time down the drain is beyond
me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainers judge us Umamusume by their own standards, so we should
be able to screen them as well. Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Agh, you know what? Forget it! I've done my part, so I'll be leaving.
Go and play hooky all you like.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But just so you know... skipping class for your experiments, ditching
the tryouts, and turning down every scouting offer—all that means you
won't be able to debut.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: To be frank, you're standing on thin ice with the academy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. She tells me to do as I like and then ends with a warning...
Heh-heh, you really are a delight, my dear Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh? If it isn't the rookie trainer from the other day!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you here to become my test subject of your own volition?! What
an amazing display of guinea pig spirit! I'm moved beyond words!
choice_data_list: No no no, you've got it all wrong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After desperately fending off an excited Agnes Tachyon, I explain
why I'm here—to get her to enter the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so that's why. Alas, I have not even an inkling of desire to
participate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just as you trainers see the tryouts as a place to discover promising
talent to scout, we Umamusume view it as an opportunity to display
our talents.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However, I see no reason to flaunt my racing skills in front of trainers
at this time. Therefore I will abstain. The end.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But on a more important note—why don't we continue our experiment
where we left off?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Last night, I completed a prototype device that can measure muscle
functions. Using this, I can collect data a thousand times more
detailed than—
choice_data_list:
Are your experiments the only thing you ever
think about?!

Are your experiments the only thing you ever
think about?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Only through experiments can we discover all manners of possibilities.
You can never possess enough time for research—am I wrong?
choice_data_list: What research could be that important?
What research could be that important?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I'm researching the potential of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: More specifically, the dormant physical potential within Umamusume as organisms. And by potential, I mean their top speed—no, what lies beyond that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
People view an Umamusume's top speed as something definite, but
common knowledge is the enemy of progress. Extrapolating without
preconception...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We recognize that the existence of us Umamusume is an enigma in
itself, no?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Despite resembling humanity, we possess high-functioning ears and
tails, as well as inexplicable strength in spite of our low muscle mass.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And when it comes to running, we can achieve speeds almost
unrivaled within the natural world.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Fascinating! Don't you think it's fascinating?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In their essence, the impulses running through my cerebral cortex are
laughably simple. How fast can we run? How far does our potential
reach?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: This I declare! With this body, I shall discover the limits of our speed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's said that the fastest Umamusume are the ones who become race-ready—that is to say, their bodies are prepared to achieve the highest possible speeds of their lifetimes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In order to enhance my speed, entering strenuous races and
challenging formidable opponents will be indispensable.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, qualifying for the Twinkle Series would undoubtedly be a
huge step forward for my research. That is why I came to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But, alas—

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon. The academy would like to have a word with you.
Come with me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmph, so they found me. Excuse me, rookie trainer, but I must depart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon follows after the teacher, and I can't help but get a
sinking feeling in my stomach.
